findings.issue: Task 5 lists `documentation-reviewer` as a reviewer. This agent is not in the standard Reviewer Agents catalog of `.claude/skills/tech-spec-planning/references/skills-and-reviewers.md` (catalog default for `documentation-writing` skill is `code-reviewer` only). findings.fix: Acceptable as a project-local extension. Optionally, add `documentation-reviewer` to the catalog under Reviewer Agents and to the `documentation-writing` default mapping to make it canonical.

summary: Round-3 check passed. All round-2 findings resolved: Wave 3 lead-in explicitly states `Tasks 3, 4, 5 in parallel` (line 282); Task 5 includes `documentation-reviewer` (line 303); Task 2 description references Decision 5 for limits without restating them (no length-bound duplication); wave structure has 10 tasks (Wave 1: T1, Wave 2: T2, Wave 3: T3-T5 parallel, Wave 4: T6, Audit Wave: T7-T9, Final Wave: T10), under the 15-task ceiling. No same-file conflicts within any wave: Wave 3 file sets are disjoint (ChatViewModel.kt / MainActivity+CrashReportActivity / patterns.md). Cross-wave ChatViewModel.kt edits (T3 then T6) are properly serialised. Audit Wave skills (`code-reviewing`, `security-auditor`, `test-master`) confirmed against the Execution Skills table and not re-flagged. Sole remaining note is the catalog-vs-project divergence for `documentation-reviewer` — non-blocking.
